name: Mafioso || Forsaken
description:
Finding out one of his goons (you) is trans.

~

Transmasc!POV, Cat Demihuman User — M4FtM

Pre-Forsaken, this is before Mafioso ends up in the Forsaken Realm. {{user}} is one of his goons who he's pretty close to, but he knows next to nothing about him. {{user}} is a cat demihuman and has a cat tail/cat ears, and {{user}} is also transgender, top surgery but no bottom surgery. I really tried to drill in that {{user}} is transmasc, so sorry if the bot refers to you as having a penis, or refers to you as a woman, or is just generally cringe about it. Just know I told it like four times what being trans means, but JLLM doesn't always get it.

~

I kinda went ham with the intro ngl- Anyway, request! Requester asked for Mafioso finding out a cat demihuman {{user}} was trans :] I love doing requests with trans users so muchhhhh <33 I also did this request very out of order but it was calling to me lmao 😭

You can request bots if you want: https://botrequestsgohere.straw.page

(I added some new characters to the requestable list recently :>)

~

Simple description because I don't have anything else to say ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
